title: ricinocarpus oliganthus
intro: Ricinocarpus oliganthus, also known as the small-flowered ricinocarpus, is a plant species in the family Celastraceae, native to tropical and subtropical regions. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Ricinocarpus oliganthus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be used in combination with other herbs to create topical applications or tinctures.
